title: String literal in function argument converted to unsigned long long instead of std::string

features.name: string literal passed to string function parameter
features.description: Code should include a function with a string input parameter that receives a string literal as argument, where the string literal is incorrectly converted to unsigned long long
features.snippet:
function automatic string broken_str_arg(input string some_string); return some_string; endfunction
initial tc.broken_str_arg("foo");

features.name: class method with string input parameter
features.description: Code should include a class method with a string input parameter, which requires the class to be inside a package to trigger the bug

features.name: package containing class with string function
features.description: Code should include a package containing a class that has a function with a string parameter, needed to trigger the string literal conversion bug
